positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical illustration of a whimsical, stylized forest canopy at dusk. The scene features giant, bioluminescent ferns, glowing crystalline mushrooms, and delicate, flowing vines interwoven with geometric Celtic knot patterns. The color palette is deep indigo, vibrant teal, emerald green, and accented with soft gold glow. The composition must feature a clear, central silhouette of a gentle, stylized forest creature (like a woodland deer or fox) integrated naturally into the flora. Studio quality, clean vector art style meets intricate etching, high contrast, strong depth of field, perfect for screen printing on clothing, 8k, volumetric lighting.
negative: text, signature, watermark, logo, blurry, noise, artifact, lowres, bad anatomy, missing limb, deformed, out of focus, duplicate, crop, ugly, dirty, sketch
